landing.title: Navigate the Future of
landing.subtitle: Aether connects candidates and organizations in a smarter way. AI-powered matching, skill gap analysis, and real career growth — all in one place.
landing.feature1Text: Our AI analyzes your skills and experience to map out the most efficient path to your dream role.
landing.feature2Text: Know exactly what's missing between you and your target job. No guessing, just clear actionable steps.
landing.feature3Text: Organizations find the right candidates instantly. Candidates find roles that actually fit them.
landing.feature4Text: Generate tailored cover letters for any job in seconds. Professional, personal, and ready to send.
landing.feature5Text: Upload your CV and get instant feedback on how to improve it for the roles you're targeting.
landing.feature6Text: Draft outreach messages, follow-ups, and replies that actually get responses.
landing.step1Text: Sign up as a candidate or organization. Takes less than a minute.
landing.step2Text: Upload your CV, add your skills, and let Aether understand what you bring to the table.
landing.step3Text: Our AI does the heavy lifting. Find the right jobs or candidates without the noise.
landing.ctaTitle: Ready to redefine your professional horizon?
landing.ctaText: Join thousands of professionals and organizations already using Aether to build better careers.
